subject: session date
fact: The session takes place on June 14th, 2026.
source_quote: Date: Jun 14th, 2026

subject: rogue Mind Illayer's lair
fact: The party pressed onward through twisted corridors deep within the rogue Mind Illayer's lair.
source_quote: Deep within the rogue Mind Illayer's lair, the party pressed onward through its twisted corridors

subject: moss-covered chamber
fact: The party found an unconscious Duergar named Thera Grabelthum in a moss-covered chamber.
source_quote: uncovering a moss-covered chamber where they found an unconscious Duergar named Thera Grabelthum

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum was found unconscious by the party.
source_quote: they found an unconscious Duergar named Thera Grabelthum

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum confessed to spying on Duergar operations for the Zhentarim Black Network.
source_quote: she confessed to spying on Duergar operations for the Zhentarim Black Network

subject: Zhentarim Black Network
fact: Thera Grabelthum was spying on Duergar operations for the Zhentarim Black Network.
source_quote: she confessed to spying on Duergar operations for the Zhentarim Black Network

subject: Thera Grabelthum turns invisible
fact: Thera Grabelthum turned invisible and fled into the darkness.
source_quote: Thera turned invisible and fled into the darkness

subject: Githyanki warriors
fact: Two Githyanki warriors burst from the muck in a sudden ambush.
source_quote: two Githyanki warriors burst from the muck in a sudden ambush

subject: Githyanki warrior
fact: A slain Githyanki warrior's skull cracked open to reveal an intellect devourer.
source_quote: a slain warrior's skull cracked open to reveal an intellect devourer

subject: intellect devourer
fact: An intellect devourer unleashed a devastating psychic blast that left the Owlbear stunned and helpless.
source_quote: unleashed a devastating psychic blast that left the Owlbear stunned and helpless

subject: intellect devourer
fact: The intellect devourer was destroyed after a fierce struggle.
source_quote: the creature was destroyed

subject: Githyanki warrior
fact: The remaining Githyanki warrior fled.
source_quote: the remaining Githyanki warrior fled

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum was killed in the chaos.
source_quote: Thera was killed in the chaos

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear was healed after the ambush.
source_quote: With the ambush behind them and the Owlbear healed

subject: freezing chamber
fact: The party discovered a freezing chamber kept cold by towering columns of ice.
source_quote: They discovered a freezing chamber kept cold by towering columns of ice

subject: massive block of opaque ice
fact: A massive block of opaque ice sat at the center of the freezing chamber.
source_quote: at the center of which sat a massive block of opaque ice

subject: suspended brains
fact: The massive block of opaque ice preserved suspended brains.
source_quote: preserving suspended brains

subject: vials of yellowish liquid
fact: The massive block of opaque ice preserved small vials of yellowish liquid.
source_quote: small vials of yellowish liquid

subject: hidden copper plate
fact: A hidden copper plate emblazoned with alien markings lay tucked within the freezing chamber.
source_quote: A hidden copper plate emblazoned with alien markings lay tucked within the room

subject: suspicious chest
fact: A suspicious chest sat nearby in the freezing chamber.
source_quote: a suspicious chest sat nearby

subject: party leaves chest alone
fact: The party chose to leave the suspicious chest alone.
source_quote: the party wisely chose to leave alone

subject: short rest
fact: The party took a short rest to recover their strength.
source_quote: After a short rest to recover their strength

subject: unlocking doors
fact: The party placed the brains they had collected at each of the sealed doors to unlock the path.
source_quote: they placed the brains they had collected at each of the sealed doors, unlocking the path

subject: Mind Illayer's innermost sanctum
fact: The path led to the Mind Illayer's innermost sanctum.
source_quote: unlocking the path to the Mind Illayer's innermost sanctum

subject: Mind Illayer's innermost sanctum
fact: The walls of the innermost sanctum were festooned with graven images of skulls and brains.
source_quote: its walls festooned with graven images of skulls and brains of every size

subject: decorative brain jars
fact: Three tall, decorative brain jars stood at the center of the innermost sanctum.
source_quote: Three tall, decorative brain jars stood at the center of the room

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought, the mad Mind Illayer, sat in the innermost sanctum sipping from a grisly jar.
source_quote: sat Rogue Thought — the mad Mind Illayer they had come to destroy

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought declared that he had been waiting for the party for a very long time.
source_quote: declared that he had been waiting for them for a very long time

subject: Githyanki warriors
fact: Four Githyanki warriors flanked Rogue Thought.
source_quote: Flanking him were four Githyanki warriors

subject: battle erupts
fact: The battle erupted immediately when one Githyanki warrior screamed that their master wished the party dead.
source_quote: one of whom immediately screamed that their master wished the party dead

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Rogue Thought identified Bramgrim as the greatest magical threat through his mind-reading.
source_quote: whom he had identified through his mind-reading as the greatest magical threat

subject: Bramgrim summons guardians
fact: Bramgrim summoned a storm of spectral guardians that scorched the warriors with holy energy.
source_quote: summoning a storm of spectral guardians that scorched the warriors with holy energy

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas loosed precise and punishing arrows from across the chamber.
source_quote: Akritas loosed precise and punishing arrows from across the chamber

subject: Githyanki teleport
fact: Two of the Githyanki warriors used their innate ability to teleport away from the spectral guardians.
source_quote: Two of the Githyanki warriors used their innate ability to teleport away from the spectral guardians

subject: Owlbear charges
fact: The Owlbear charged through the far door and crashed into Rogue Thought.
source_quote: The Owlbear charged through the far door and crashed into Rogue Thought himself

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: The Owlbear delivered a powerful strike that visibly staggered Rogue Thought.
source_quote: delivering a powerful strike that visibly staggered the ancient creature

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur unleashed a massive fireball that engulfed the Mind Illayer and nearly every Githyanki warrior.
source_quote: he unleashed a massive fireball that roared through the chamber and engulfed the Mind Illayer and nearly every Githyanki warrior

subject: Rogue Thought severed tentacles
fact: Rogue Thought severed his own tentacles and dropped them to the ground.
source_quote: he severed his own tentacles, dropped them to the ground

subject: Rogue Thought escapes
fact: Rogue Thought vanished in a flash of planar magic, escaping to another dimension entirely.
source_quote: vanished in a flash of planar magic, escaping to another dimension entirely

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought warned that he and Graz'zt would have their revenge.
source_quote: both he and Graz'zt would have their revenge

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim finished off the last surviving Githyanki warrior with a burst of necrotic energy.
source_quote: Bramgrim finished off the last surviving Githyanki warrior with a burst of necrotic energy

subject: Rogue Thought's severed tentacles
fact: The party collected Rogue Thought's severed tentacles as proof of their victory.
source_quote: The party collected Rogue Thought's severed tentacles as proof of their victory

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz traveled alongside the party one last time to Sporedome.
source_quote: with Arrizz traveling alongside them one last time

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz paused at the edge of the fungal city to offer his farewell.
source_quote: At the edge of the fungal city, the dry-witted drow paused and offered his farewell

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz said he hoped never to see the party again, but if he did, it would be because they were coming to save him.
source_quote: he hoped never to see them again, but if he did, he was certain it would be because they were coming to save him

subject: Mind Illayer who hired the party
fact: The Mind Illayer who hired them received the tentacles without ceremony.
source_quote: The Mind Illayer who had hired them received the tentacles without ceremony

subject: reward for party
fact: The Mind Illayer rewarded the party with powerful magical gifts.
source_quote: rewarded the party with powerful magical gifts

subject: Order of the Gauntlet
fact: The Mind Illayer promised to pass vital intelligence about Graz'zt's operations to the Order of the Gauntlet.
source_quote: promising to pass vital intelligence about Graz'zt's operations to the Order of the Gauntlet

subject: Order of the Gauntlet
fact: The Order of the Gauntlet is the only faction the Mind Illayer trusted enough to deal with directly.
source_quote: the only faction the creature trusted enough to deal with directly

subject: Hillsfar
fact: The party returned to Hillsfar on the surface.
source_quote: Back on the surface, the party returned to Hillsfar

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana is the city's powerful and influential criminal matriarch.
source_quote: Isthana, the city's powerful and influential criminal matriarch

subject: private dinner invitation
fact: The party was promptly invited to a private dinner by Isthana.
source_quote: were promptly invited to a private dinner by Isthana

subject: three bottles of rare wine
fact: Three bottles of rare wine were served as a personal gift to Felkur.
source_quote: three bottles of rare wine — a personal gift to Felkur

subject: business proposal
fact: The party floated the idea of starting a business in the city.
source_quote: the party floated the idea of starting a business in the city

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana warned that any business under her patronage would thrive.
source_quote: any business under her patronage would thrive

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana warned that any venture without her support would find the city a very difficult place to operate.
source_quote: any venture without her support would find the city a very difficult place to operate

subject: dinner conclusion
fact: The party left the dinner without signing anything.
source_quote: left the dinner without signing anything

subject: future arrangements with Isthana
fact: The door remained open for future arrangements with Isthana.
source_quote: though the door remained open for future arrangements

subject: Graz'zt's revenge
fact: Rogue Thought warned that he and Graz'zt would have their revenge.
source_quote: both he and Graz'zt would have their revenge
